title: Launch announcements — On the Impossibility of Mitigating AI Jailbreaks
text:
First post on AI Reliability Review (reliable-ai.review). Discord is linked from the site.



Hi Editors <3<3,
finally publishing our blog with a first blog post, and beyond want to connect the community with a discord server and a sub-stack. Join and subscribe :)
Social media announcements going out tomorrow:
blog: https://reliable-ai.review/ substack: https://substack.com/@aireliabilityreview/ discord: https://discord.com/invite/RZHSpYuqbz




We are launching a new blog; Reliable-AI.Review. First post is up: On the Impossibility of Mitigating AI Jailbreaks.
We write about AI reliability from three angles: Technical: building secure, private, reliable AI systems. Empirical: tracking benchmarks, progress, and failure modes. Societal: how these systems shape, and are shaped by, human behavior.
Read it, and find our Discord, subscribe to our substack or RSS. Writing about this too? We want contributors text us on discord. We are trying to build community, NYC events coming soon.



Guys, Mark and Candance and Jingtong and I have been cooking…
please support
https://bsky.app/profile/karen-ullrich.bsky.social/post/3mpj74iv5qs2g https://www.linkedin.com/posts/karen-ullrich_we-are-launching-a-new-blog-httpsreliable-aireview-share-7477727097097043968-fBTD/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAACK-gHIBcKtgmhr_yQDBD0arW-OAdOZGNb4
